market_read: Market signals are mixed, showing cross-currents between hardware bottlenecks and platform ROI confidence. TSM underperformance weakens foundry confirmation.

data_health.message: Data retrieval OK. 34 of 34 tickers retrieved. Core tickers available.

interpretation.plain_english: The hard regime is mixed, but the closest profile is D. This means the model does not see a clean regime break, but the current pattern most resembles CAPEX Bubble Fear. The market is pricing rising AI CAPEX bubble concern: demand confirmation is weak, bottleneck leadership is fading, stress is high, and breadth is poor.
why: Demand Score is weak, suggesting lack of confidence in platform ROI.
Bottleneck leadership is fading against broader benchmarks.
Breadth is poor, indicating very narrow participation across the AI chain.
watch_next: Watch for any recovery in Breadth or Demand as early signs of stabilization.
Watch Credit spreads (HYG/LQD) to see if AI stress is bleeding into broader macro liquidity.
interpretation.investor_reading: The market is punishing high-beta AI infrastructure and long-duration hardware stories. Balance-sheet quality, cash-flow durability, and defensive positioning matter more in this regime.

divergence_warnings.message: TSM is underperforming SMH over 20D, suggesting foundry leadership is not confirming broader semiconductor strength.
